The file is not empty, it contains space and tabs. 

Converting each space into a 0, and each tab into 1 gives us: 
011000110111010001100110011110110111010001100001011000100111001101100001011011100110010001110011011100000110000101100011011001010111001101111101

Converting to ascii gives us:
ctf{tabsandspaces}
